zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Criol於1282年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾維爾登時，她的父親Nicholas de Criol22歲，母親Margery Pecche22歲。她和John Pabenham III至少有2個兒子。她去世於1345年享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Criol于1282年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾維爾登时，她的父亲Nicholas de Criol22岁，母亲Margery Pecche22岁。她和John Pabenham III至少有2个儿子。她去世于1345年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Krill   or   Grill  . This surname is also found in the Channel Islands.
English and Scottish: metathesized form of   Curl  .

variants.name: Krill
meanings: nickname for a lively, cheerful person, from Low German krill ‘lively, healthy’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Criol was born in 1282, in Wilden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas de Criol, was 22 and her mother, Margery Pecche, was 22. She had at least 2 sons with John Pabenham III. She died in 1345, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Criol est née en 1282, à Wilden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Criol, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery Pecche, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec John Pabenham III. Elle est décédée en 1345, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Criol 1282 in Wilden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas de Criol 22 und ihre Mutter Margery Pecche 22. Sie hatte mit John Pabenham III mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1345 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Criol è nata il nel 1282 nel Wilden, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Nicholas de Criol, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margery Pecche, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con John Pabenham III. Morì nel 1345, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Criol(이)가 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 윌든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Criol(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Pecche(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 John Pabenham III(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Criol nasceu em 1282, em Wilden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Criol, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery Pecche, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com John Pabenham III. Ela faleceu em 1345, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Criol родилась в 1282 г. в местности уаилден, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Criol было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Pecche, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от John Pabenham III. Она умерла в 1345 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Criol nació en 1282, en Wilden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas de Criol, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery Pecche, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con John Pabenham III. Murió en 1345, a la edad de 63 años.
